description: Worker-Mode delegation hooks. Delegation enforcement is NOT done here — it is done structurally via tool-stripping the orchestrator (settings.json `agent: coordinator` + coordinator.md tools allowlist with no Write/Edit/Bash), which proved more robust than the removed PreToolUse deny-hook (force-delegate, which mis-fired on stderr redirects, git commit messages, etc.). Remaining hooks are observers/reminders only: (1) SubagentStop record-worker: pure observer, appends one JSONL record per worker. (2) SessionStart check-config: non-blocking WORKER_LOG_PATH reminder. The fail-loud hard stop for a missing log path lives in record-worker.mjs.
